milestone: M3 知识固化 + 教练长生成修复

what.knowledge: Distilled the short-video methodology (5-dimension analysis framework + 6 picture-design principles + hook guide) from 爆款短视频制作与分析知识库.md / 爆火视屏回答模版.txt into compact constants in agent_persona.py, injected per-intent into coaching prompts (build_branch_prompt). Bridge rules + agent generation; no new skill runtime (the stable detection/state/error logic is already Bridge-side rules from M2).
what.gateway_fix: Discovered the OpenClaw Gateway WS chat client capped total wait at 30s, which 502'd long coaching generations (reshoot 分镜方案 / full script). Made the timeout env-tunable (OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS) with a 120s default. Pre-existing limit, surfaced by detailed coaching.

deploy.method: LF upload to release src + py_compile; rebuilt only the OpenClaw bridge (root_rebuild_bridge_fast.sh)

local_tests: 310 tests; only the pre-existing unrelated identity-diagnostics failure remains.

coaching_e2e.why_not_viral: grounded ~2.5k-char diagnosis structured on the 5-dimension framework, referencing the actual analyzed video
coaching_e2e.reshoot_before_fix: HTTP 502 (Gateway 30s timeout on the long 分镜方案 generation)
coaching_e2e.reshoot_after_fix: HTTP 200, 4522-char grounded复拍方案 (复拍目标 + 分镜 + picture-design concepts), referencing the actual video content

key_validation: Coaching follow-ups are grounded in the real analysis AND now follow the固化 methodology (5 dimensions / picture principles); the long-generation 502 is fixed via the 120s gateway timeout.
